name: Mcp
description: ElizaOS plugin allowing agents to connect to MCP servers

mcp.label: Mcp
mcp.help: Serialized (e.g., JSON) configuration that defines MCP settings and server definitions; read at runtime to establish MCP server connections.

PATH.label: Path
PATH.help: System PATH inherited from the host environment and forwarded to child processes when launching an MCP server through stdio transport.
